summary: Tested new Reports page (/reports), HLS gateway endpoint, and mobile bottom-tab 'More' hidden. Backend: 13/13 new pytest tests pass in /app/backend/tests/test_reports_hls.py covering /reports/summary, /reports/detections (status known/unknown filter, person, date range, limit, auth required) and /api/v1/cameras/{id}/hls/index.m3u8 reachability. Frontend desktop /reports: page renders title 'Detection reports', window chips 7d/30d/90d, status chips ALL/KNOWN/UNKNOWN, search input, KPI cards (Total 672, Known 118, Unknown 554, Known % 17.6%), 4 SVG charts, Top cameras bar list, Hourly distribution, 121 detection rows; Excel export downloads vx-detections-2026-06-26.xls. Filter/window/status chip clicks reload data without errors. Camera View modal on /(tabs)/cameras opens, shows SYNTHETIC PREVIEW badge (LAN IPs unreachable from cloud — expected), close button works, no crash. Mobile (390x844) /(tabs)/alerts: alerts-screen testID renders correctly, bottom tab bar contains 4 tabs (Overview/Live/Cameras/Alerts) and 'More' is NOT present — confirmed via screenshot and body-text scan.

issues: The 'LIVE' badge (red, top-right of preview canvas) and the 'SYNTHETIC PREVIEW' badge appear to overlap / stack on top of each other in the top-right corner of the preview when the camera is offline and falling back to MJPEG synthetic preview. Either suppress the 'LIVE' badge when in synthetic-preview mode or stack them vertically — currently they overlap and are partially unreadable.

KPI label color contrast: TOTAL/KNOWN/UNKNOWN/KNOWN % labels are very faint (low-opacity white on near-black). Numbers are readable but uppercase tracking labels could use slightly higher opacity for accessibility.

action_items: (LOW) Avoid showing the red 'LIVE' badge when the preview falls back to synthetic mode — currently both 'LIVE' and 'SYNTHETIC PREVIEW' badges overlap in the same corner of the camera modal canvas (see /app/test_reports/camera_modal.png).

(INFO) RN-Web style warning logged repeatedly: 'Invalid style property of "animation". Did you mean "animationKeyframes"?' — somewhere a CSS-style `animation: ...` shorthand is passed to a RN Web component. Non-blocking but pollutes the console; consider migrating to `animationKeyframes` or `Animated.*` for compatibility.
(INFO) `props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents` warning — minor RN Web deprecation.
critical_code_review_comments: reports.py /detections endpoint uses `flt['alert_type'] = {'$not': {'$regex': 'Face', '$options': 'i'}}` for status=unknown — this correctly excludes Face-* alert types but ALSO excludes documents where alert_type is null/missing only because the $not on a non-existent field returns true in MongoDB. Behavior verified correct in tests (all unknown items have non-Face alert types). Acceptable.

reports.py /detections: `status` field in response is derived inline as `'known' if 'Face' in d.get('alert_type','')`. This couples the contract to the alert_type string starting with 'Face'. Acceptable for now but document that alert_type must contain 'Face' (case-sensitive at the response layer but case-insensitive at the query layer — slight inconsistency).

reports.py raw _id is returned in `id` field — confirm _id is a string UUID (not ObjectId). In tested DB it appears to be string, but safer to coerce via `str(d['_id'])` defensively to avoid future ObjectId serialization regressions.

Excel export is client-side generated as .xls (the file vx-detections-2026-06-26.xls) — this is HTML masquerading as Excel (SpreadsheetML or HTML table). Some Excel installs warn 'The file format and extension don't match'. Consider switching to a real .xlsx blob (sheetjs) for production polish.
Camera modal: when HLS fails the badge layer should switch text not overlay — minor.
seed_data_creation: None. The existing seeded alerts (672 in the last 30d window) and 4 cameras were sufficient.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_reports_hls.py -v` (13 tests, ~23s). For UI, login as admin then visit /reports — should fully render with KPIs/charts/rows + working Excel export. For mobile, set viewport 390x844 and visit /(tabs)/alerts — bottom tab bar should show 4 tabs (Overview, Live, Cameras, Alerts) with NO 'More'. Camera View modal on /(tabs)/cameras intentionally falls back to SYNTHETIC PREVIEW because the seeded RTSP URLs point to private LAN IPs not reachable from cloud — that is expected behavior, not a bug.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The only minor item is a UI polish issue where the LIVE and SYNTHETIC PREVIEW badges overlap inside the camera modal preview canvas (both rendered on top-right). To fix, conditionally render only one of them based on stream type, or stack them vertically with spacing.
